name: groffdev-codex-plugin
description: Groffdev Codex workflow plugin: research, plan, grill, implement, review, address PR comments, and hand off through nested Codex CLI workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Research, plan, grill, implement, review, and hand off with Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native workflow plugin. It stores research, plans, execution packets, reviews, and handoffs under thoughts/ and delegates implementation or review to fresh Codex CLI instances.
defaultPrompt: Use research-codebase to document how this repo works.
Use create-plan and grill-me to produce a stress-tested implementation plan.
Use implement-plan to execute the approved plan with fresh Codex CLI instances.
